channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Patriots QB Drake Maye returns to game after evaluation for head injury vs. Chargers
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — Patriots rookie quarterback Drake Maye has returned to the game after being evaluated for a head injury following a blow to the helmet in the first quarter of New England’s matchup with the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck announces plan to enter NFL draft after season-ending elbow injury
item.description: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck has announced his plans to enter the NFL draft, five days after having season-ending elbow surgery.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval to resign after heading team's unpopular move to Las Vegas
item.description: Athletics president Dave Kaval is resigning from his position after eight years. Kaval was the public face of the team's move from Oakland to Las Vegas..
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dies from cancer at age 78
item.description: Greg Gumbel, a longtime CBS sportscaster who broke barriers during his career calling some of the biggest sporting events, has died from cancer, according to a statement from his family released by the network on Friday. He was 78.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Panthers place 1,000-yard rusher Chuba Hubbard on IR for final 2 games with strained calf
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Chuba Hubbard's season is over. The Panthers placed their leading rusher on injured reserve Saturday with a strained calf. Hubbard was limited in practice on Friday with a knee injury and was listed as questionable to play Sunday against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eli Manning and Antonio Gates are among the finalists for the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Two-time Super Bowl MVP Eli Manning, former Defensive Players of the Year Luke Kuechly and Terrell Suggs, and prolific tight end Antonio Gates are among the finalists for the 2025 Pro Football Hall of Fame class.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dodgers set to re-sign outfielder Teoscar Hernández for $66 million over 3 years, AP source says
item.description: Teoscar Hernández is headed back to the Los Angeles Dodgers. The free agent outfielder has agreed with the reigning World Series champions on a $66 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press late Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Corbin Burnes and Arizona Diamondbacks agree to $210 million, 6-year deal, AP source says
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Corbin Burnes and the Arizona Diamondbacks have agreed to a $210 million, six-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press late Friday night. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the deal was pending a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Latvia stuns Canada in world junior hockey, winning 3-2 on lone shootout goal
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Eriks Mateiko scored the lone goal of a shootout in the eighth round to give Latvia a 3-2 victory over Canada on Friday night in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McCord throws for 453 yards, 5 TDs in No. 22 Syracuse's 52-35 Holiday Bowl win over Washington State
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Kyle McCord threw for 453 yards and five touchdowns to break Deshaun Watson's Atlantic Coast Conference season passing record and lead No. 22 Syracuse to a 52-35 victory over depleted-yet-scrappy Washington State in the Holiday Bowl on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Syracuse's Kyle McCord breaks Deshaun Watson's ACC season passing yards record
item.description: Kyle McCord broke Deshaun Watson’s Atlantic Coast Conference season passing yards record on a 50-yard completion to Darrell Gill Jr. on No. 22 Syracuse’s first play of the second half in a 52-35 Holiday Bowl victory overt Washington State on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shaq Barrett expected to re-sign with Bucs after being waived by Dolphins, reports say
item.description: Former Tampa Bay Buccaneers linebacker Shaq Barrett is expected to once again sign with the Bucs after he was waived by the Miami Dolphins, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tuch scores hat trick, Sabres beat Blackhawks 6-2 for 2nd straight win after 13-game skid
item.description: Alex Tuch scored a hat trick for the Buffalo Sabres in a 6-2 win against the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vanderbilt beats Georgia Tech 35-27 in Birmingham Bowl for first postseason win in 11 years
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Diego Pavia and Vanderbilt delivered another victory to end a surprising season. Pavia threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores and Vanderbilt secured its first winning season since 2013 with a 35-27 victory over Georgia Tech on Friday in the Birmingham Bowl.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Browns restructure QB Deshaun Watson's contract to create cap space, flexibility, AP source says
item.description: BEREA, Ohio (AP) — The Cleveland Browns have again restructured quarterback Deshaun Watson's massive contract to create salary-cap space and give them future flexibility, a person familiar with the move told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Simone Biles sports custom Jonathan Owens outfit to Bears' final home game
item.description: Olympic gymnast Simone Biles wore a custom outfit dedicated to her husband, Chicago Bears safety Jonathan Owens, to his team's final home game of the season on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Navy denies Oklahoma victory in Armed Forces Bowl after stopping late 2-point conversion
item.description: Navy held on to beat Oklahoma 21-20 in the Lockheed Martin Armed Forces Bowl Friday after its defense denied a late two-point conversion attempt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' Nick Sirianni clears the air after heated postgame confrontation with former player Zach Ertz
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni said Thursday that he and former Eagles player Zach Ertz, now with the Washington Commanders, are all good after they got into a postgame confrontation following the Eagles' loss to the Commanders on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL legend Eric Dickerson keeps it brutally honest about Saquon Barkley chasing his rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley is 268 yards away from becoming the NFL's single-season rushing record holder, but Eric Dickerson is rooting for Barkley to come up short.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dodgers' Mookie Betts shares message to Yankees fans who tried to pry ball out of his glove in World Series
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers right fielder Mookie Betts revealed his message for the the Yankees fans who tried to pry the ball out of his glove during Game 4 of the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys shut down star CeeDee Lamb for rest of season due to shoulder injury
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys, officially eliminated from playoff contention, have shut down star receiver CeeDee Lamb for the remainder of the season due to a shoulder injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sean Manaea to re-sign with Mets for $75 million over 3 years, AP source says
item.description: Sean Manaea is set to return to the New York Mets on a $75 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the agreement told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods and son Charlie share the lead at PNC Championship in Orlando
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods and 15-year-old son Charlie ran off five straight birdies on the back nine Saturday for a 13-under 59 in the scramble format, giving them a share of the lead in the PNC Championship in Woods' first competition since back surgery in September.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jeremiyah Love overcomes injury and illness to propel Notre Dame into 1st Sugar Bowl since 2007
item.description: Notre Dame running back Jeremiyah Love wasted no time sending a message to his teammates Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Northwestern demolishes DePaul in crosstown showdown
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. (WGN) — An early blitz on the offensive end and playmaking down the stretch from Brooks Barnhizer and Nick Martinelli helped seal a convincing win for Northwestern over DePaul in the yearly crosstown showdown between the two programs.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
